title: ANZSRC 2020 FoR Division 52 Psychology fields
authority: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Stats NZ, Australian Research Council, and New Zealand Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment
scope: All 36 field-level codes nested under the six groups of ANZSRC 2020 Fields of Research Division 52 Psychology. This is an Australia and New Zealand R&D statistical classification, not a global ontology. Indigenous psychology is explicitly located outside Division 52 in Division 45 Indigenous studies.
notes: The inventory is complete at field level. Pending decisions remain explicit until each group is adjudicated; coverage completeness must not be confused with resolution.
